chapter_title: Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
text: A business may not maintain more than five on-premise signs for each frontage on a single road at a single business location.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 394. Regul. of Outdoor Signs on Rural Roads
##### § 394.047 — Number of Signs

A business may not maintain more than five on-premise signs for each frontage on a single road at a single business location.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A business may not maintain more than five on-premise signs for each frontage on a single road at a single business location.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
